posts.text: Tenneco Clean Air India Ltd Sector: Auto Ancillary Basic Details Market Cap: ₹23,254 Cr Issue Price: ₹397 per share (Upper Price Band) Current Price: ~₹585 per share (June 2026) Listing Date: 19 November 2025 Financial Highlights Revenue (FY26): ₹5,404 Cr Net Profit (FY26): ₹604 Cr ROE: ~19.9% Debt-to-Equity: 0.00 (Debt Free) Revenue Growth (3-year CAGR): ~10-11% Business Overview What they do Tenneco Clean Air India is a leading Tier-1 automotive component manufacturer supplying emission control systems, powertrain solutions and advanced ride technologies to leading passenger vehicle, commerc…
